records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Die already!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! Die already!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! Die already!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... these useless people are holding up better than I thought.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... these useless people are holding up better than I thought.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... these useless people are holding up better than I thought.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right. I have a good idea.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right. I have a good idea.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right. I have a good idea.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I saw it in a cartoon where people get stronger when they combine their strengths, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I saw it in a cartoon where people get stronger when they combine their strengths, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I saw it in a cartoon where people get stronger when they combine their strengths, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... Then I should let them be eaten!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... Then I should let them be eaten!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... Then I should let them be eaten!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe... There, there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe... There, there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe... There, there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you see those people over there? They said that they want to play with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you see those people over there? They said that they want to play with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you see those people over there? They said that they want to play with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Start with her. I want to see how the mister next to her will react.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Start with her. I want to see how the mister next to her will react.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Start with her. I want to see how the mister next to her will react.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, go play with them, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, go play with them, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, go play with them, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watch out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watch out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watch out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what just happened?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what just happened?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what just happened?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Olga, Andrei. Are you okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Olga, Andrei. Are you okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Olga, Andrei. Are you okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-Mavka?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-Mavka?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-Mavka?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're injured all over, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're injured all over, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're injured all over, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: thank goodness you're all right... But where's Sasha?
records.m_Talk_DEU: thank goodness you're all right... But where's Sasha?
records.m_Talk_FRA: thank goodness you're all right... But where's Sasha?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sasha's... gone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sasha's... gone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sasha's... gone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But thanks to her, I was able to come back to life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But thanks to her, I was able to come back to life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But thanks to her, I was able to come back to life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on. I'll save everyone!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on. I'll save everyone!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on. I'll save everyone!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* You should've said something if you were still alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* You should've said something if you were still alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* You should've said something if you were still alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no time to let our guard down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no time to let our guard down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no time to let our guard down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're unsure if Mavka can even win. We must support her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're unsure if Mavka can even win. We must support her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're unsure if Mavka can even win. We must support her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Olga, can you move?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Olga, can you move?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Olga, can you move?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah... I have to!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah... I have to!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah... I have to!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?! She's still alive! I knew it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?! She's still alive! I knew it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?! She's still alive! I knew it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: See? What did we tell you?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: See? What did we tell you?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: See? What did we tell you?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stay sharp! We're still in battle!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stay sharp! We're still in battle!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stay sharp! We're still in battle!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Protect the residents! The three of us will deal with the C.O.s and Drekavac!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Protect the residents! The three of us will deal with the C.O.s and Drekavac!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Protect the residents! The three of us will deal with the C.O.s and Drekavac!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Mavka! I knew you'd still be ali
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Mavka! I knew you'd still be ali
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Mavka! I knew you'd still be ali
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rude. You're attacking me as soon as you see me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rude. You're attacking me as soon as you see me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rude. You're attacking me as soon as you see me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I was fighting for you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I was fighting for you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I was fighting for you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Drekavac...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Drekavac...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Drekavac...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your heinous acts end here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your heinous acts end here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your heinous acts end here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, really?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, really?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, really?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How does it feel to be attacked in the same way?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How does it feel to be attacked in the same way?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How does it feel to be attacked in the same way?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Huh? Your body... it's repairing itself?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Huh? Your body... it's repairing itself?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Huh? Your body... it's repairing itself?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was Sasha's ability, wasn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was Sasha's ability, wasn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was Sasha's ability, wasn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wonder if I'll become stronger if I inherit something from Eva too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wonder if I'll become stronger if I inherit something from Eva too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wonder if I'll become stronger if I inherit something from Eva too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where is she, anyway...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where is she, anyway...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where is she, anyway...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll save you the trouble of finding her. Because you're both going to die here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll save you the trouble of finding her. Because you're both going to die here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll save you the trouble of finding her. Because you're both going to die here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. All right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. All right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. All right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's more fun to break you if you come out like that, anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's more fun to break you if you come out like that, anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's more fun to break you if you come out like that, anyway.
